channel.title: Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: CS Dream
item.description: CS Dream is a open book that introduces computer science to the general audience. The book discusses general topics such as the usage of search engines, places to find books, and the importance of English. In addition, it also introduces several courses that are usually taught at the universities. The courses covered include Assembly Language, Discrete Mathematics, Cryptography, etc.

item.title: Gifted
item.description: Gifted is a novel website that tells fictional stories. The stories are about how different people perceive the same situation differently. The web site utilizes Flash to create animations to accompany the stories. I have also written a post about how I created the website: 〈宏碁數位創作獎作品——「天予」之創作歷程〉.
